14.content:
*Weird since this is canon*

Why does he wear Diapers?
14.title: Cosmo

141.content: What does he need them for?
141.title: Needs them

142.content:
Writer's Note: see that the rules say "Don't diaper adults, but I didn't make this option. I hope that it's not deleted because Cosmo has worn a diaper in the show multiple times. I'm only continuing the story. Now onto the story!

Cosmo was in his house wondering what to do today. He played some X-Box, cards, and even played music with his band of magical beings. However, he was still so bored (magical fairy bored...how crazy is that)! He decided to check on his son, Poof.

Poof was wished up by their godson, Timmy in a special episode of the Fairly Oddparents. Cosmo and Wanda are thankful to Timmy every day for their dream come true. They have a son thanks to him.

Cosmo entered Poof's room to watch him play with him toy rattle. Poof was getting very good at controlling his magical powers! Cosmo told Poof about how he was so bored and wished that he could have fun too. Just then, Cosmo saw that Poof needed a diaper change, so he changed poof and then put him down for a nap. Cosmo joined him since he couldn't think of anything else to do anyway.
142.title: Likes them

1421.content:
Cosmo woke up, his son still asleep next to him. He got out of the crib and an idea struck him. He was always a little curious and he was hungry too. He grabbed a bottle from Poof's shelf and he started to suckle on the nipple of it. He knew that this was babyish, but boy was it good! He was much happier now, but he still felt bored. He looked at the changing table.

He knew that he loved the feel of them ever since he and Wanda fought that one anniversary. He floated over to the changing table and poofed himself naked. He got baby wipes, oil, powder, and of course, a diaper. He lied down in the table and started to change his diaper.
1421.title: Likes Them Continued

14212.content:
Cosmo had forgotten that Timmy wished to be inside of their magical, underwater castle. Timmy was checking on Poof like a good God brother when he saw a green-haired fairy's bottom sit on the changing table. He watched Cosmo in his baby moment and decided to surprise him.

Cosmo just finished applying baby powder to his bottom when Timmy jumped up "Surprise!" Cosmo jumped up, exposing himself for all to see. At this point Poof woke up and said "Daddy Didee!" Timmy said "Yes Poof. Your daddy is going to wear a diaper. Lie down baby boy so Timmy can help."

Cosmo lied back down and Timmy lifted his legs into the air to slide the diaper under his bottom. Timmy folded the diaper up and now Cosmo was wearing a diaper. It was magical, so it grew to Cosmo's size.

Timmy: "Awww. Baby has a perfectly snug diaper now. Don't worry, I'm here to take care of both of you."
14212.title: Somebody Walks In

Jorgen was excited to spend a Saturday with his godchild, Winston was puny and small so he liked feeling needed by the child as a protector. He magically lifted the child in the air to dress him and saw soaked pants.
"Oh, Winston-Again?"
"Ah! I'm sorry- sir!" Winston cried with a milteray salute he was taught to do, completely shaking until a large rubber thing was ppofed into his mouth. He nervously sucked the pacifier starting to calm down as Jorgen
